# Issue Templates

GitHub issue templates for structured feedback on Maayar documentation.

---

## Templates

| Template | Purpose | Labels |
|----------|---------|--------|
| [documentation-feedback.md](./documentation-feedback.md) | Report docs issues or suggest improvements | `documentation` |
| [architecture-question.md](./architecture-question.md) | Architecture questions or design proposals | `architecture` |

---

## Usage

Select the appropriate template when opening a new GitHub Issue. Templates pre-fill structured fields to help maintainers triage efficiently.
